title: L&M Essentials
description: The Essentials for the L&M server!
body:
# 🌿 L&M Essentials


<details>
<summary>Vanilla Focused Pack</summary>

**L&M Essentials** is a performance-first, vanilla-friendly modpack designed to enhance your multiplayer experience on the **[L&M SMP](https://lnmindustries.online/)** — though it runs great on any vanilla-compatible server. This is not a collection of random mods, but a carefully curated, minimalist, and immersive enhancement to Minecraft—designed specifically for community-focused survival servers.

## ✨ What’s Inside

- 🎧 **Proximity Voice Chat** (via [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice)) — Talk to nearby players in-game, no extra apps needed.
- 🚀 **Performance Boosts** — With optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others, enjoy smoother FPS and better world loading.
- 🎮 **Client-Side Enhancements** — Includes small QOL improvements like better F3 UI clarity and visual tweaks that *don’t* mess with core gameplay.
- ✅ **100% Vanilla-Compatible** — You can play on vanilla without desync, weird chunk bugs, or cheating accusations.
- 🌐 **Multiplayer Focused** — All features are picked to support healthy server interactions, from voice to visuals — never unfair advantages.

## 🎯 Why Use This?

If you:
- Play on the **[L&M SMP](https://lnmindustries.online/)** (or similar community servers)
- Want voice chat without Discord
- Like vanilla gameplay but crave better performance
- Don’t want to guess what every mod is doing behind the scenes

...this pack is built for you.

## 🔧 Is It Just for [L&M SMP](https://lnmindustries.online/)?

Nope! While we made this modpack for our server, it works beautifully anywhere that sticks to the vanilla-style ruleset. Whether you're just joining L&M or want a lightweight upgrade for your own world, **L&M Essentials** gives you the essentials — and nothing more.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Modded+ Focused Pack</summary>

**L&M Essentials Modded+** is built for the **[L&M SMP](https://lnmindustries.online/)** — though this runs fine on any other server/client!

## ✨ What’s Inside

- 🎧 **Proximity Voice Chat** (via [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/)) — Talk to nearby players in-game, no extra apps needed.
- 🚀 **Performance Boosts** — With optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others, enjoy smoother FPS and better world loading.
- 🎮 **Fully-Modded** — Includes a massive array of decoration mods, food mods, and even tech mods!
- 🌐 **Multiplayer Focused** — We have picked out these mods to try and enhance the gameplay and elong the progression of the game!

## 🎯 Why Use This?

If you:
- Play on the **[L&M SMP](https://lnmindustries.online/)** (or similar community servers)
- Want voice chat without Discord
- Like modded gameplay with some added performance!
- Want a new challenge in Minecraft and seek more than normal vanilla.

...this pack is built for you.

## 🔧 Is It Just for [L&M SMP](https://lnmindustries.online/)?

Nope! While we made this modpack for our server, it works nicely alone or with any other friend-group. Whether you're just joining L&M or want a new modded experience, **L&M Essentials Modded+** gives you the essentials — and everything else.

</details>
